#### Get in touch with us

# EHA Parkview Eldercare (Johor Bahru - Perling) 温馨疗养院 (新山Perling)

EHA Parkview Eldercare in Perling, Johor Bahru, offers a nurturing environment for elderly residents. The facility is designed to provide comprehensive care, ensuring that each resident receives personalized attention tailored to their needs. With a team of professional caregivers, the nursing home focuses on maintaining the well-being and dignity of every individual. The serene surroundings and comfortable amenities contribute to a homely atmosphere, making it an ideal choice for families seeking quality eldercare solutions in Johor Bahru.

![EHA Parkview Eldercare front view](https://ehaeldercare.com.my/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/EHA-Parkview-Eldercare-front-view.jpg)

###### Schedule hours

*   Mon – Sun (7 days):9.00am – 6.00pm

###### Location

*   2 & 4, Jalan Sutera Merah 3, Taman Sutera, 81200 Johor Bahru, Johor
*   018-218 2727
*   ask.ehaparkview@gmail.com

Nationwide Careline

## [+6019-728 3697](tel:+60197283697)
